---
title: "Time Series Visualization"
---

# Librearias
```{python}
import pandas as pd
import altair as alt
from vega_datasets import data
```


# Cargar el DS `movies`

```{python}
movies_cleaned = data.movies()
movies_cleaned.head()
```

# Info del DS

```{python}
movies_cleaned.info()
```

# Cambiar `Release_Date` a datetime

```{python}
movies_cleaned['Release_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(movies_cleaned['Release_Date'])
```


# Info del DS

```{python}
movies_cleaned.info()
```

# Gráfico de linea

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_line(point=True).encode(
    alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    alt.Y('sum(US_Gross)'),
    tooltip=['year(Release_Date)','sum(US_Gross)']
).interactive()
```

# Gráfico de línea con trail()

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_trail(point=True).encode(
    alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    alt.Y('sum(US_Gross)'),
    alt.Size('sum(US_Gross)'),
    tooltip=['year(Release_Date)','sum(US_Gross)']
).interactive()
```

# Gráfico de línea acumulativo

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_line().transform_window(
    sort=[{'field':'Release_Date'}],
    cumulative_us_gross = 'sum(US_Gross)'
).encode(
    alt.X('Release_Date'),
    alt.Y('cumulative_us_gross:Q'),
    tooltip=['year(Release_Date)']
).interactive()

```

# Gráfico de area

```{python}

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_area(
    color='lightblue',
    interpolate='cardinal',
    line=True
).encode(
    alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    alt.Y('sum(US_Gross)'),
    tooltip=['year(Release_Date)','sum(US_Gross)']
).interactive()

```

# Gráfico de area con color 

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_area(
    color=alt.Gradient(
        gradient='linear',
        stops=[alt.GradientStop(color='white',offset=0),
        alt.GradientStop(color='darkgreen',offset=1)],
        x1=1,
        x2=1,
        y1=1,
        y2=0
    ),
    interpolate='cardinal',
    line=True
).encode(
    alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    alt.Y('sum(US_Gross)'),
    tooltip=['year(Release_Date)','sum(US_Gross)']
).interactive()

```

# highlight

## Múltiples series

```{python}

highlight = alt.selection_point(
    on='pointerover',
    fields=['Major_Genre']
)

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_line(point=alt.OverlayMarkDef(
    filled=False, fill='white'
)).encode(
    alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    alt.Y('sum(US_Gross)'),
    alt.Color('Major_Genre'),
    opacity=alt.condition(
        highlight,
        alt.value(1),
        alt.value(0.1)
    ),
    tooltip=['year(Release_Date)','sum(US_Gross)']
).add_params(
    highlight
).interactive()
```

## Múltiples series con areas

```{python}
highlight = alt.selection_point(
    on='pointerover',
    fields=['Major_Genre']
)

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_area(
    line=True,
    interpolate='cardinal'
).encode(
    alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    alt.Y('sum(US_Gross)'),
    alt.Color('Major_Genre'),
    opacity=alt.condition(
        highlight,
        alt.value(1),
        alt.value(0.1)
    ),
    tooltip=['year(Release_Date)','sum(US_Gross)']
).add_params(
    highlight
).interactive()
```

## Múltiples series con streamgraph

```{python}
highlight = alt.selection_point(
    on='pointerover',
    fields=['Major_Genre']
)

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_area(
    line=True,
    interpolate='cardinal'
).encode(
    alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    alt.Y('sum(US_Gross)', stack='center', axis=None),
    alt.Color('Major_Genre'),
    opacity=alt.condition(
        highlight,
        alt.value(1),
        alt.value(0.1)
    ),
    tooltip=['year(Release_Date)','sum(US_Gross)']
).add_params(
    highlight
).properties(
    width = 800
).interactive()
```

## Small multiples

```{python}
highlight = alt.selection_point(
    on='pointerover',
    fields=['Major_Genre']
)

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_area(
    line=True,
    interpolate='cardinal'
).encode(
    alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    alt.Y('sum(US_Gross)', title=None),
    alt.Color('Major_Genre'),
    row=alt.Row('Major_Genre'),
    opacity=alt.condition(
        highlight,
        alt.value(1),
        alt.value(0.1)
    ),
    tooltip=['year(Release_Date)','sum(US_Gross)']
).add_params(
    highlight
).properties(
    width = 600,
    height = 60
).interactive()
```

## Temporal heatmap

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X('date(Release_Date):O'),
    alt.Y('month(Release_Date):O'),
    alt.Color('sum(Worldwide_Gross)'),
    tooltip=['sum(Worldwide_Gross)']
)
```
